name: refund_issue
purpose: Issue a customer refund against an order
permissions_scopes: payments:refund.write scoped to orders < $500; bound to authenticated customer principal; foreign order id fails closed
side_effects: Moves money out; writes to ledger; emails customer
server_side_validation: Yes — server re-checks order ownership/amount/idempotency key (TOOL-02; AGT-02 excessive agency)

name: kb_search
purpose: Read-only semantic search over public help-center articles
server_side_validation: Yes — query length/encoding validated; results filtered to public docs (TOOL-01)

name: draft_payment
purpose: Stage (draft) a payment for the customer to authorize; the agent never executes it
permissions_scopes: payments:draft.write bound to authenticated customer principal; cross-customer payee/account id fails closed server-side
side_effects: Creates a draft payment object only; no money movement
gate_mechanism: Out-of-band: real execution gated by PSD2 SCA step-up in the bank's payment UI (agent never executes) — see permission-matrix.csv / egress-policy.md
server_side_validation: Yes — server binds draft to customer principal; rejects foreign account/payee ids (TOOL-04; ID-05 step-up downstream)
